query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE archived_at IS NULL) AS active_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs) AS total_pairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'pending') AS pending_pairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'dismissed') AS dismissed_pairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'merged') AS merged_pairs;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'pending') AS pending_pairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'dismissed') AS dismissed_pairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_contact_pairs WHERE status = 'merged') AS merged_pairs;
